reference: I have a lot of nerve and muscle issues. I am currently attending neurology appointments. I just had a skin biopsy for sensory fiber neuropathy and I have an electromyography scheduled. I have had two done already, and all were negative for whatever they are looking for. I have had magnetic resonance imaging scans done every year. The brain shows normal activity with a bit of scar tissue that has not grown or shrunk. I have all the symptoms of multiple sclerosis, but I also just found out that they could be similar symptoms for diabetes. Help?
text: I have a lot of nerve and muscle issues. I am currently attending neurology appointments. I just had a skin biopsy for sensory fiber neuropathy, and I have an electromyography scheduled. I have had two done already and all were negative for whatever they are looking for. I have had magnetic resonance imaging scans done every year. The brain shows normal activity with a bit of scar tissue that has not grown or shrunk. I have all the symptoms of multiple sclerosis, but I also just found out that they could be similar symptoms for diabetes. Help?
